inputs.label: Rebar Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard rebar diameter in millimeters, used to auto‑calculate weight per meter if custom weight is not provided.

label_i18n.es: Diámetro de la barra de refuerzo (mm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard rebar diameter in millimeters, used to auto‑calculate weight per meter if custom weight is not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden standart inşaat demiri çapı; özel ağırlık sağlanmazsa metre başına ağırlığı otomatik hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Bewehrungsdurchmesser in Millimetern, zur automatischen Berechnung des Gewichts pro Meter, falls kein benutzerdefiniertes Gewicht angegeben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre standard de la barre d'armature en millimètres, utilisé pour calculer automatiquement le poids par mètre si un poids personnalisé n'est pas fourni.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro estándar de la barra de refuerzo en milímetros, usado para calcular automáticamente el peso por metro si no se proporciona un peso personalizado.

inputs.label: Length per Bar (m)
inputs.businessContext: Typical standard factory bar length before any laps or cuts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical standard factory bar length before any laps or cuts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir bindirme veya kesimden önce tipik standart fabrika çubuk uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Standard-Werkslänge vor Überlappungen oder Kürzungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur standard typique d'une barre en usine avant tout recouvrement ou coupe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud estándar típica de fábrica antes de cualquier empalme o corte.

inputs.label: Number of Bars
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of bars required for the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total quantity of bars required for the project.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje için gereken toplam çubuk miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmenge der für das Projekt benötigten Stäbe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité totale de barres requises pour le projet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad total de barras requeridas para el proyecto.

inputs.label: Lap Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Additional splicing length added per bar for overlap joints.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional splicing length added per bar for overlap joints.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bindirmeli ek yerleri için çubuk başına eklenen ek birleştirme uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Stoßlänge pro Stab für Überlappungsverbindungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de jonction supplémentaire ajoutée par barre pour les joints de recouvrement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud adicional de empalme añadida por barra para uniones traslapadas.

inputs.label: Wastage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overage for cutting waste, bending loss and site damage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage overage for cutting waste, bending loss and site damage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim atığı, bükme kaybı ve saha hasarı için yüzde fazlalık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Zuschlag für Schnittverlust, Biegeverlust und Bauschäden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de surplus pour les chutes de coupe, les pertes de cintrage et les dommages sur site.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de sobremedida por pérdidas de corte, pérdidas por doblado y daños en obra.

inputs.label: Custom Weight per Meter (kg/m)
inputs.businessContext: Optional override for the theoretical weight; if 0 or blank, weight is calculated from diameter using the formula 0.006165 × d².

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional override for the theoretical weight; if 0 or blank, weight is calculated from diameter using the formula 0.006165 × d².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teorik ağırlık için isteğe bağlı geçersiz kılma; 0 veya boş ise ağırlık, 0.006165 × d² formülü kullanılarak çaptan hesaplanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler Überschreibwert für das theoretische Gewicht; bei 0 oder leer wird das Gewicht aus dem Durchmesser mit der Formel 0,006165 × d² berechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remplacement facultatif du poids théorique ; si 0 ou vide, le poids est calculé à partir du diamètre selon la formule 0,006165 × d².
businessContext_i18n.es: Sobrescritura opcional para el peso teórico; si es 0 o está en blanco, el peso se calcula a partir del diámetro usando la fórmula 0.006165 × d².

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
